## Protocol Change Summary
Brief description of the proposed change.

## Motivation
Why is this change needed?

## Proposed Change
Detailed description of the protocol change, including wire format changes.

## Backward Compatibility
Is this a breaking change? How will backward compatibility be maintained?

## Reference Implementation
Any reference implementation or test vectors.
